vocab.example: To counteract a sedentary lifestyle, I make a conscious effort to take brisk walks during my lunch breaks.

vocab.meaning: phương pháp tiếp cận toàn diện
vocab.example: I adopt a holistic approach to health, focusing not just on physical exertion but also on emotional resilience.
Swimming is my preferred method for building cardiovascular endurance without putting too much strain on my joints.

vocab.meaning: hệ vi sinh vật đường ruột
vocab.example: I consume fermented foods regularly to maintain a diverse gut microbiome, which is essential for a robust immune system.
Practicing intermittent fasting has significantly improved my energy levels and mental clarity throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: sự ổn định của các cơ cốt lõi
vocab.example: Pilates is an excellent discipline for enhancing core stability and improving overall posture.

vocab.meaning: y học dự phòng/biện pháp phòng bệnh
vocab.example: Regular health screenings are a form of preventative medicine that I take very seriously as I get older.
I try to base my meals on nutrient-dense ingredients like leafy greens and seeds rather than empty calories.

vocab.meaning: phục hồi tích cực (vận động nhẹ để cơ bắp hồi phục)
vocab.example: On my rest days, I engage in active recovery, such as light stretching or a gentle stroll, to reduce muscle soreness.
Aligning my sleep schedule with my natural circadian rhythm has done wonders for my productivity and mood.
